title: More Modular Golems
description: Adds modded materials to Modular Golems
body:
**This mod is in beta. Here be dragons!**

Has it ever bothered you how Modular Golems has support for some Tinkers' materials, but some are missing?

No? Here you go anyway.

This mod adds support for more modded materials to Modular Golems, so you can have more cool golem combinations.

### Currently supported materials:
- Pig Iron (Tinkers' Construct, you can eat your golem when hungry)

### Roadmap:
- Vanilla Backport (creaking)
- Oreganized (lead, silver, electrum)
